name: HideNativeButtons
description: Hides unwanted native Discord buttons (Logs, Help, DevTools, Inbox)

name: ConcatenatedModules
description: Extract modules that have been concatenated by the bundler

name: Settings
description: Adds Settings UI and debug info

name: NoTrack
description: Disable Discord's tracking (analytics/'science'), metrics and Sentry crash reporting

name: AlwaysAnimate
description: Animates anything that can be animated

name: AutoZipper
description: Automatically zips specified file types and folders before uploading to Discord

name: SupportHelper
description: Helps us provide support to you

name: SilentEdit
description: "Silently" edit a message without showing the edit tag and bypass Vencord's message logger.

name: BetterGifAltText
description: Change GIF alt text from simply being 'GIF' to containing the gif tags / filename

name: BetterCommands
description: Enhances the command system with miscellaneous improvements.

commands.name: refresh
commands.description: Refreshes the specified applications commands locally

name: BetterGifPicker
description: Makes the gif picker open the favourite category by default

name: BetterPlusReacts
description: The amount of plus before :emoji: is the message to add it to

name: BetterRoleDot
description: Copy role colour on RoleDot (accessibility setting) click. Also allows using both RoleDot and coloured names simultaneously

name: BetterUploadButton
description: Upload with a single click, open menu with right click

name: BlurNSFW
description: Blur attachments in NSFW channels until hovered

name: BypassPinPrompt
description: Bypass the pin prompt when using the pin functions

name: CleanChannelName
description: Remove emoji and decoration from channel names. Reverts to the original while you're editing the channel.

name: ClearURLs
description: Automatically removes tracking elements from URLs you send

name: CleanerChannelGroups
description: Hides all channels in collapsed categories, even if they have unread messages.

name: ColorSighted
description: Removes the colorblind-friendly icons from statuses, just like 2015-2017 Discord

name: ConsoleShortcuts
description: Adds shorter Aliases for many things on the window. Run `shortcutList` for a list.

name: CopyStatusUrls
description: Copy the users status url when you right-click it

name: CustomCommands
description: Allows you to create custom slash commands / tags

name: CustomIdle
description: Allows you to set the time before Discord goes idle (or disable auto-idle)

name: DontRoundMyTimestamps
description: Always rounds relative timestamps down, so 7.6y becomes 7y instead of 8y

name: Equissant
description: Crossant every specified amount of clicks :trolley:

name: F8Break
description: Pause the client when you press F8 with DevTools (+ breakpoints) open.

name: FixCodeblockGap
description: Removes the gap between codeblocks and text below it

name: ForceOwnerCrown
description: Force the owner crown next to usernames even if the server is large.

name: ForwardAnywhere
description: If a forward fails send it as a normal message also allows nsfw forwards

name: FriendInvites
description: Create and manage friend invite links via slash commands (/create friend invite, /view friend invites, /revoke friend invites).

commands.name: view friend invites
commands.description: View a list of all generated friend invites.

name: GifPaste
description: Makes picking a gif in the gif picker insert a link into the chatbox instead of instantly sending it

name: ILoveSpam
description: Do not hide messages from 'likely spammers'

name: ImplicitRelationships
description: Shows your implicit relationships in the Friends tab.

name: ImageFilename
description: Display the file name of images & GIFs as a tooltip when hovering over them

name: InviteDefaults
description: Allows you to edit the default values when creating server invites.

name: IrcColors
description: Makes username colors in chat unique, like in IRC clients

name: KeepCurrentChannel
description: Attempt to navigate to the channel you were in before switching accounts or loading Discord.

name: LoadingQuotes
description: Replace Discords loading quotes

name: MessageBurst
description: Merges messages sent within a time period with your previous sent message if no one else sends a message before you.

name: MessageClickActions
description: Customize click actions on messages.

name: MessageNotifier
description: Get toasts for when chosen users send a message

name: MiddleClickTweaks
description: Various middle click tweaks, such as with pasting and link opening.

name: MoreQuickReactions
description: Improves the quick react buttons in the message context menu.

name: MoreCommands
description: Adds various fun and useful commands

commands.name: rolldice
commands.description: Roll a die with the specified number of sides

commands.name: flipcoin
commands.description: Flips a coin and returns heads or tails

commands.name: ask
commands.description: Ask a yes/no question and get an answer

commands.name: randomnumber
commands.description: Generates a random number between two values

commands.name: transform
commands.description: Transform your text with the specified option

commands.name: wordcount
commands.description: Counts the number of words in a message

commands.name: countdown
commands.description: Starts a countdown from a specified number

commands.name: ping
commands.description: Pings the bot to check if it's responding

commands.name: morse
commands.description: Translate to or from Morse code

commands.name: gifroulette
commands.description: Tempt fate and send a gif

commands.name: friendcloud
commands.description: Display user you most interact with in a cloud

commands.name: imgtogif
commands.description: Allows you to turn an image to a gif

name: Moyai
description: Plays a 🗿 sound effect whenever a moyai emoji is sent, reacted, or used as a voice effect in your current channel.

name: DisableDeepLinks
description: Disables Discord's stupid deep linking feature which tries to force you to use their Desktop App

name: NoDevtoolsWarning
description: Disables the 'HOLD UP' banner in the console. As a side effect, also prevents Discord from hiding your token, which prevents random logouts.

name: NoF1
description: Disables F1 help bind.

name: NoMaskedUrlPaste
description: Pasting a link while having text selected will not paste as masked URL

name: NoMosaic
description: Removes Discord image mosaic

name: NoOnboardingDelay
description: Skips the slow and annoying onboarding delay

name: NoPendingCount
description: Removes the ping count of incoming friend requests, message requests, and nitro offers.

name: NoProfileThemes
description: Completely removes Nitro profile themes from everyone but yourself

name: NoRPC
description: Disables Discord's RPC server.

name: NoPushToTalk
description: Bypasses the push-to-talk requirement for voice activity in channels that enforce it.

name: NoRoleHeaders
description: We are all equal!! Removes the role headers in the member list.

name: NoServerEmojis
description: Do not show server emojis in the autocomplete menu.

name: NoTypingAnimation
description: Disables the CPU-intensive typing dots animation

name: NoUnblockToJump
description: Allows you to jump to messages of blocked or ignored users and likely spammers without unblocking them

name: NoSystemBadge
description: Disables the taskbar and system tray unread count badge.

name: NormalizeMessageLinks
description: Strip canary/ptb from message links

name: NotificationVolume
description: Save your ears and set a separate volume for notifications and in-app sounds

name: OnePingPerDM
description: If unread messages are sent by a user in DMs multiple times, you'll only receive one audio ping. Read the messages to reset the limit

name: OpenInApp
description: Open links in their respective apps instead of your browser

name: PartyMode
description: Allows you to use party mode cause the party never ends ✨

name: PermissionFreeWill
description: Disables the client-side restrictions for channel permission management.

name: PetPet
description: Adds a /petpet slash command to create headpet gifs from any image

commands.name: petpet
commands.description: Create a petpet gif. You can only specify one of the image options

name: PlainFolderIcon
description: Dont show the small guild icons in folders

name: PolishWording
description: Tweaks your messages to make them look nicer and have better grammar. See settings

name: QuickReply
description: Reply to (ctrl + up/down) and edit (ctrl + shift + up/down) messages via keybinds

name: ReactErrorDecoder
description: Replaces "Minified React Error" with the actual error.

name: RelationshipNotifier
description: Notifies you when a friend, group chat, or server removes you.

name: ReplyPingControl
description: Control whether to always or never get pinged on message replies, with whitelist and blacklist features

name: RevealAllSpoilers
description: Reveal all spoilers in a message by Ctrl-clicking a spoiler, or in the chat with Ctrl+Shift-click

name: SecretRingToneEnabler
description: Always play the secret version of the discord ringtone (except during special ringtone events)

name: SelfForward
description: Adds the current channel to the forward list popup

name: ShowAllMessageButtons
description: Always show all message buttons no matter if you are holding the shift key or not.

name: ShowResourceChannels
description: shows the channels hidden behind the server resources in the channel list

name: SpotifyShareCommands
description: Share your current Spotify track, album or artist via slash command (/track, /album, /artist)

name: StickerPaste
description: Makes picking a sticker in the sticker picker insert it into the chatbox instead of instantly sending

name: StreamingCodecDisabler
description: Disable codecs for streaming of your choice

name: StreamerModeOn
description: Automatically enables streamer mode when you start streaming in Discord

name: SuperReactionTweaks
description: Customize the limit of Super Reactions playing at once, and super react by default

name: ThemeAttributes
description: Adds data attributes to various elements for theming purposes

name: TiktokTTS
description: Adds a context menu option to read out chat messages with the good ol' Tiktok TTS voice :sob:

name: Title
description: Replaces the window title prefix

name: ToggleVideoBind
description: Adds a customizable bind to toggle webcam.

name: Unindent
description: Trims leading indentation from codeblocks

name: UnlockedAvatarZoom
description: Allows you to zoom in further in the image crop tool when changing your avatar

name: UserMessagesPronouns
description: Adds pronouns to chat user messages

name: VoiceChatDoubleClick
description: Join voice chats via double click instead of single click

name: VoiceJoinMessages
description: Recieve client-side ephemeral messages when your friends join voice channels

name: WebContextMenus
description: Re-adds context menus missing in the web version of Discord: Links & Images (Copy/Open Link/Image), Text Area (Copy, Cut, Paste, SpellCheck)

name: WebKeybinds
description: Re-adds keybinds missing in the web version of Discord: ctrl+t, ctrl+shift+t, ctrl+tab, ctrl+shift+tab, ctrl+1-9, ctrl+,. Only works fully on Vesktop/Legcord, not inside your browser

name: WriteUpperCase
description: Changes the first Letter of each Sentence in Message Inputs to Uppercase

name: KeyboardSounds
description: Adds OperaGX, osu! or Mechvibes sound effects when typing on your keyboard.

name: VolumeBooster
description: Allows you to set the user and stream volume above the default maximum

name: AntiDeleteMessage
description: Automatically resends your messages if someone deletes them. Cache persisted across restarts.

name: AntiNickname
description: Automatically resets any nickname forcefully assigned to you in a server. Works even without admin permissions.

name: AudioLimiter
description: Automatically caps the volume of other users — no more screaming or loud noises that pierce your ears.

name: AutoUnmute
description: Automatically unmutes and undeafens when you are server muted/deafened, if you have permissions

name: CrashHandler
description: Utility plugin for handling and possibly recovering from crashes without a restart

name: CursorMacOS
description: Replaces Windows SYSTEM cursors with authentic macOS cursors (.cur/.ani). Restores default cursors when disabled.

name: ImageLink
description: Never hide image links in messages, even if it's the only content

name: Impersonate
description: Locally simulates a message sent by any user via the /impersonate command. Only visible to you.

name: NoNitroUpsell
description: Automatically blocks Nitro upsell/gift popups that Discord keeps showing.

name: NoUnblockToJump
description: Allows you to jump to messages of blocked or ignored users and likely spammers without unblocking them

name: ShowHiddenThings
description: Displays various hidden & moderator-only things regardless of permissions.

name: SpotifyCrack
description: Free listen along, no auto-pausing in voice chat, and allows activity to continue playing when idling

name: UnlimitedAccounts
description: Increases the amount of accounts you can add.

name: AltKrispSwitch
description: Makes the Noise Suppression Popout switch between None and Krisp instead of Krisp and Standard

name: BannersEverywhere
description: Displays banners in the member list

name: BetterActivities
description: Shows activity icons in the member list and allows showing all activities

name: BetterBlockedUsers
description: Allows you to search in blocked users list and makes names selectable in settings.

name: BetterFolders
description: Shows server folders on dedicated sidebar and adds folder related improvements

name: BetterInvites
description: See invites expiration date, view inviter profile and preview servers before joining by clicking the name

name: BetterSettings
description: Enhances your settings-menu-opening experience

name: BiggerStreamPreview
description: This plugin allows you to enlarge stream previews

name: BlockKeywords
description: Blocks messages containing specific user-defined keywords, as if the user sending them was blocked.

name: BypassStatus
description: Still get notifications from specific sources when in do not disturb mode. Right-click on users/channels/guilds to set them to bypass do not disturb mode.

name: ChannelBadges
description: Adds badges to channels based on their type

name: CharacterCounter
description: Adds a character counter to the chat input

name: ChannelTabs
description: Group your commonly visited channels in tabs, like a browser

name: ClickableRoles
description: Click on roles in user profiles and the member list to see which members have them.

name: ClientSideBlock
description: Allows you to locally hide almost all content from any user

name: ClipsEnhancements
description: Add more Clip FPS and duration options, custom clip length, RPC tagging and more

name: ConsoleJanitor
description: Disables annoying console messages/errors

name: CommandPalette
description: Quickly run actions through a searchable command palette

name: CopyEmojiMarkdown
description: Allows you to copy emojis as formatted string (<:blobcatcozy:1026533070955872337>)

name: ContentWarning
description: Allows you to specify certain trigger words that will be blurred by default. Hovering/Clicking on the blurred content will reveal it.

name: CopyFileContents
description: Adds a button to text file attachments to copy their contents

name: CopyStickerLinks
description: Adds the ability to copy & open Sticker links

name: CopyUserMention
description: Adds a button to copy user's mention on the user context menu, works best with ValidUser.

name: CursorBuddy
description: Adds a sprite that follows your cursor.

name: CopyUserURLs
description: Adds a 'Copy User URL' option to the user context menu.

name: CustomFolderIcons
description: Customize folder icons with any png

name: CustomRPC
description: Add a fully customisable Rich Presence (Game status) to your Discord profile

name: CustomSounds
description: Customize Discord's sounds.

name: CustomTimestamps
description: Custom timestamps on messages and tooltips

name: CustomUserColors
description: Lets you add a custom color to any user, anywhere! Highly recommend to use with typingTweaks and roleColorEverywhere

name: Declutter
description: Cleans up Discord by removing non-essential UI elements like profile effects, shop tabs, boosts, and more.

name: Dearrow
description: Makes YouTube embed titles and thumbnails less sensationalist, powered by Dearrow

name: DiscordDevBanner
description: Enables the Discord developer banner, in which displays the build-ID

name: DisableCameras
description: Disables cameras in a call by default

name: Decor
description: Create and use your own custom avatar decorations, or pick your favorite from the presets.

name: DragFavoriteEmotes
description: Adds the ability to change the order of your favourite emotes

name: Dragify
description: Drop users, channels, or servers into chat to insert mentions or invites.

name: ExitSounds
description: Play soundboard sounds when you disconnect from voice.

name: Experiments
description: Enable Access to Experiments & other dev-only features in Discord!

name: ExpressionCloner
description: Allows you to clone Emotes & Stickers to your own server (right click them)

name: FastDeleteChannels
description: Adds a trash icon to delete channels

name: FavoriteEmojiFirst
description: Puts your favorite emoji first in the emoji autocomplete and also has emoji alias.

name: FavouriteAnything
description: Favourite any image, video, or file attachment

name: FavoriteGifSearch
description: Adds a search bar to favorite gifs.

name: FileUpload
description: Upload images and videos to file hosting services like Zipline and Nest

name: FindReply
description: Jumps to the earliest reply to a message in a channel (lets you follow past conversations more easily).

name: FixFileExtensions
description: Fixes file extensions by renaming them to a compatible supported format if possible

name: FixImagesQuality
description: Improves quality of images by loading them at their original resolution

name: FontLoader
description: Loads any font from Google Fonts

name: FriendCodes
description: Generate FriendCodes to easily add friends

name: FrequentQuickSwitcher
description: Rewrites and filters the quick switcher results to be your most frequent channels

name: FriendTags
description: Allows you to filter by custom tags in the quick switcher by starting a search with &

name: FriendsSince
description: Shows when you became friends with someone in the user popout

name: FriendshipRanks
description: Adds badges showcasing how long you have been friends with a user for

name: FullSearchContext
description: Makes the message context menu in message search results have all options you'd expect

name: FullUserInChatbox
description: Makes the user mention in the chatbox have more functionalities, like left/right clicking

name: FullVCPFP
description: Makes avatars take up the entire vc tile

name: GameActivityToggle
description: Adds a button next to the mic and deafen button to toggle game activity.

name: GifCollections
description: Allows you to create collections of gifs.

name: GoogleThat
description: Adds a command to send a internet search link

name: Ghosted
description: A cute ghost will appear if you don't answer their DMs

name: GlobalBadges
description: Adds global badges from other client mods

name: HideChatButtons
description: Able to hide the chat buttons

name: GreetStickerPicker
description: Allows you to use any greet sticker instead of only the random one by right-clicking the 'Wave to say hi!' button

name: GuildPickerDumper
description: Context menu to dump and download a server's emojis and stickers.

name: HideMessages
description: Temporarily hide messages and DMs until you restart.

name: HomeTyping
description: Changes the home button to a typing indicator if someone in your dms is typing

name: HideServers
description: Allows you to hide servers from the guild list and quick switcher by right clicking them

name: Husk
description: Adds Husk button (check settings to change used emoji)

name: HopOn
description: Hop on! Opens a configurable URL when a message matches a custom regex in the current channel.

name: IRememberYou
description: Locally saves everyone you've been communicating with (including servers), in case of lose

name: IdleAutoRestart
description: Automatically restarts the client after being idle for a configurable amount of time, but avoids restarting while you are in VC.

name: IgnoreActivities
description: Ignore activities from showing up on your status ONLY. You can configure which ones are specifically ignored from the Registered Games and Activities tabs, or use the general settings below

name: Ingtoninator
description: Suffixes 'ington' to a random word in your message

name: InstantScreenshare
description: Instantly screenshare when joining a voice channel with support for desktop sources, windows, and video input devices (cameras, capture cards)

name: InvisibleChat
description: Encrypt your Messages in a non-suspicious way!

name: JumpTo
description: Adds context menu options to jump to the start or bottom of a channel/DM.

name: Jumpscare
description: Adds a configurable chance of jumpscaring you whenever you open a channel. Inspired by Geometry Dash Mega Hack

name: KeywordNotify
description: Sends a notification if a given message matches certain keywords or regexes

name: LastFMRichPresence
description: Little plugin for Last.fm rich presence

name: LastActive
description: A plugin to jump to last active message from yourself or another user in a channel/server.

name: LoginWithQR
description: Allows you to login to another device by scanning a login QR code, just like on mobile!

name: MentionAvatars
description: Shows user avatars and role icons inside mentions

name: MessageColors
description: Displays color codes like #FF0042 inside of messages

name: MessageLatency
description: Displays an indicator for messages that took ≥n seconds to send

name: MessageFetchTimer
description: Shows how long it took to fetch messages for the current channel

name: MessageLinkEmbeds
description: Adds a preview to messages that link another message

name: MessageTranslate
description: Auto translate messages to your language with caching, per-channel toggles, and more options.

name: MessageLinkTooltip
description: Adds a tooltip with a message preview when hovering over message links, replies, and forwarded messages.

name: MessagePeek
description: Shows the last message preview and timestamp in the Direct Messages list.

name: MoreUserTags
description: Adds tags for webhooks and moderative roles (owner, admin, etc.)

name: MoreStickers
description: Adds sticker packs from other social media platforms. (e.g. LINE)

name: MusicControls
description: Music Controls and Lyrics for multiple services

name: MutualGroupDMs
description: Shows mutual group dms in profiles

name: NeverPausePreviews
description: Prevents in-call/PiP previews (screenshare, streams, etc) from pausing even if the client loses focus

name: NoReplyMention
description: Disables reply pings by default

name: OrbolayBridge
description: Bridge plugin to connect Orbolay to Discord

name: PauseInvitesForever
description: Brings back the option to pause invites indefinitely that stupit Discord removed.

name: OverrideForumDefaults
description: Allows you to override default forum layout/sort order. you can still change it on a per-channel basis

name: CancelFriendRequest
description: Adds a way to cancel outgoing friend requests from profiles.

name: NotificationTitle
description: Makes desktop notifications more informative

name: PermissionsViewer
description: View the permissions a user or channel has, and the roles of a server

name: PictureInPicture
description: Adds picture in picture to videos (next to the Download button)

name: NewGuildSettings
description: Automatically mute new servers and change various other settings upon joining

name: PinIcon
description: Adds a pin icon to pinned messages

name: PingNotifications
description: Customizable notifications with improved mention formatting

name: PreviewMessage
description: Lets you preview your message before sending it.

name: ProfileSets
description: Allows you to save and load different profile presets, via the Profile Section in Settings.

name: QuickMention
description: Adds a quick mention button to the message actions bar

name: Questify
description: Enhance specific Quest features, disable annoyances, or completely remove Quests.

name: Quoter
description: Adds the ability to create an inspirational quote image from a message.

name: RandomVoice
description: Adds a button near mute to join a random voice channel.

name: RemixRevived
description: Revives Remix and breings it to Desktop

name: RepeatMessages
description: Allows you to repeat messages quickly. If you hold shift while clicking the Repeat option, it will reply to the message.

name: ReplaceGoogleSearch
description: Replaces the Google search with different Engine(s)

name: RecentDMSwitcher
description: Ctrl+Tab between most recently used DMs (Ctrl+Shift+Tab reverse)

name: ReplyTimestamp
description: Shows a timestamp on replied-message previews

name: ReviewDB
description: Review other users (Adds a new settings to profiles)

name: RichMagnetLinks
description: Renders magnet links like message links

name: RichPresence
description: Unified rich presence hub for AudioBookShelf, osu!, stats.fm, Jellyfin, ListenBrainz, and Gensokyo Radio.

name: RoleColorEverywhere
description: Adds the top role color anywhere possible

name: RPCStats
description: Displays stats about your activity as an rpc

name: SaveFavoriteGIFs
description: Export favorited GIF urls

commands.name: savegifs
commands.description: Save all favorite GIF urls to a text file

commands.name: saveworkinggifs
commands.description: Test all favorite GIFs and only save the ones that are still working

name: ScreenRecorder
description: Adds an option to record your screen and upload the recording to the channel

name: RPCEditor
description: Edit the type and content of any Rich Presence

name: ScheduledMessages
description: Schedule messages to be sent at a specific time or after a delay.

name: SearchFix
description: Fixes the annoying "We dropped the magnifying glass!" error.

name: SekaiStickers
description: Sekai Stickers built in discord originally from github.com/TheOriginalAyaka

name: Summaries
description: Enables Discord's experimental Summaries feature on every server, displaying AI generated summaries of conversations

name: SendTimestamps
description: Send timestamps easily via chat box button & text shortcuts. Read the extended description!

name: ServerInfo
description: Allows you to view info about a server

name: ServerListIndicators
description: Add online friend count or server count in the server list

name: ShikiCodeblocks
description: Brings vscode-style codeblocks into Discord, powered by Shiki

name: ServerSearch
description: Navigate your servers better with a quick search button

name: ShowBadgesInChat
description: Shows the message author's badges beside their name in chat.

name: ShowConnections
description: Show connected accounts in user popouts

name: ShowMeYourName
description: Display any permutation of custom nicknames, friend nicknames, server nicknames, display names, and usernames in chat.

name: ShowSongName
description: Shows song name instead of artist for Spotify activity

name: ShowMessageEmbeds
description: Adds a context menu option to show embeds for links that don't have one

name: ShowTimeoutDuration
description: Shows how much longer a user's timeout will last, either in the timeout icon tooltip or next to it

name: SilentMessageToggle
description: Adds a button to the chat bar to toggle sending a silent message.

name: Signature
description: Automated fingerprint/end text

name: Soggy
description: Adds a soggy button to the toolbox

name: Snowfall
description: Let it snow on Discord

name: SilentTyping
description: Hide that you are typing

commands.name: silent-typing
commands.description: Hide your typing indicator from chat.

name: SpotifyActivityToggle
description: Adds a toggle button for Spotify activity visibility.

name: SteamStatusSync
description: Sync your status to Steam! (Online, Away, Invisible, or Offline.)

name: StatusPresets
description: Allows you to remember your statuses and set them later

name: StickerBlocker
description: Allows you to block stickers from being displayed.

name: StartupTimings
description: Adds Startup Timings to the Settings menu

name: TalkInReverse
description: Reverses the message content before sending it.

name: TextReplace
description: Replace text in your messages. You can find pre-made rules in the #textreplace-rules channel in Vencord's Server

name: TidalEmbeds
description: Embeds TIDAL songs to make them playable in Discord.

name: Timezones
description: Shows the local time of users in profiles and message headers

name: ToastNotifications
description: Show a pop-up toast notification, configurable for DMs, group, friends, or guild channels.

name: ToneIndicators
description: Show tooltips for tone indicators like /srs, /gen, etc. in sent messages.

name: TypingTweaks
description: Show avatars and role colours in the typing indicator

name: TypingIndicator
description: Adds an indicator if someone is typing on a channel.

name: UnitConverter
description: Converts metric units to Imperal units and vice versa

name: UniversalMention
description: Mention any user, regardless of channel access.

name: UnreadCountBadge
description: Shows unread message count badges on channels in the channel list

name: UnsuppressEmbeds
description: Allows you to unsuppress embeds in messages

name: UrlHighlighter
description: Highlights URLs in messages that match your patterns.

name: USRBG
description: Displays user banners from USRBG, allowing anyone to get a banner without Nitro

name: VcNarrator
description: Announces when users join, leave, or move voice channels via narrator

name: ViewRaw
description: Copy and view the raw content/data of any message, channel or guild

name: VCPanelSettings
description: Control voice settings right from the voice panel

name: ViewRawVariant
description: Copy/View raw content of any message, channel, or guild, but show in the right click menu.

name: VoiceButtons
description: Quickly DM, mute, or deafen any user right from the voice-call panel.

name: VoiceChatUtilities
description: This plugin allows you to perform multiple actions on an entire channel (move, mute, disconnect, etc.) (originally by dutake)

name: VoiceChannelLog
description: Logs voice channel activity including joins, leaves, soundboard, mute, camera, screenshare, and more.

name: WaitForSlot
description: Automatically join a full voice channel when a slot opens.

name: WebpackTarball
description: Converts Discord's webpack sources into a tarball.

name: WhitelistedEmojis
description: Adds the ability to disable all message emojis except for a whitelisted set.

name: WigglyText
description: Adds a new markdown formatting that makes text wiggly.

name: WhoReacted
description: Renders the avatars of users who reacted to a message

name: ZipPreview
description: Previews ZIP contents inside file attachments.

name: XSOverlay
description: Forwards discord notifications to XSOverlay, for easy viewing in VR

name: DMBomb
description: Sends an aggressive message to ALL server members or a specific role via right click.

name: FakeVoice
description: Appear muted or deaf while listening. By mushzi.

name: Abbreviation
description: Automatically replaces abbreviations with full sentences before sending the message.

name: AlwaysTrust
description: Removes 'untrusted domain' and 'suspicious download' popups. Also allows deleting a server without typing its name.

name: AntiDM
description: Blocks group DM invites with a log panel. Left-click icon = view logs. Right-click = toggle on/off.

name: AntiMoveDeco
description: Adds a button to prevent being moved or disconnected from a voice channel.

name: AutoCorrect
description: Automatically corrects spelling and grammar before sending. Requires a free Groq API key configured in raincordAI.

name: AutoResponder
description: Automatically reply to DMs using AI to match your writing style.

name: AutoReply
description: Automatically replies to received messages. Button in the text bar (next to VoiceDictation).

name: BetterRoleContext
description: Adds options to copy role color / edit role / view role icon when right clicking roles in the user profile

name: Backpack
description: Organize chat bar buttons into a backpack. Left-click to use packed buttons, right-click to pack/unpack buttons.

name: BulkFriendRemove
description: Delete multiple friends at once.

name: BigFileUpload
description: Bypasses Discord's upload limit via GoFile, Catbox, or a custom uploader. Button in the right-click menu or /fileupload command.

name: CallTimer
description: Add call timers for all users in voice channels and in the connection status.

name: CancelFriendRequest
description: Cancels a pending friend request by clicking the button again.

name: ChannelWallpaper
description: Allows for custom backgrounds for every individual channel.

name: CreateTheme
description: Create Theme UI — registered via settings.tsx

name: DisableCallIdle
description: Disables automatically getting kicked from a DM voice call after 3 minutes and being moved to an AFK voice channel.

name: DoubleCall
description: Join two voice channels simultaneously with your own account.

name: DoubleEmoji
description: Keeps the emoji picker open on click and highlights selected emojis with a blue border.

name: RAINCORDHelper
description: Main RAINCORD plugin: fixes Discord crashes, adds UI options and manages internal commands.

name: EquicordToolbox
description: Adds a button next to the inbox button in the channel header that houses RAINCORD quick actions

name: EncryptedMessage
description: Encrypts your messages with 400 unique techniques (0–399). Only those who know the key can decrypt.

name: EventLogs
description: Logs: deleted/edited messages, voice, friends, servers.

name: ExportDM
description: Exports your DMs with messages, images, videos, audio, links, embeds, stickers, reactions in TXT/JSON/CSV/MD/HTML.

name: FakeSwitcher
description: Right-click → add a user to the switcher. Click in the switcher → your profile takes their appearance locally.

name: FakeDM
description: Injects fake local messages into a DM or group DM. Button in the text bar. Persists across restarts.

name: FakePerm
description: Visually simulates moderation options in the right-click menu. No real action.

name: FakeFriends
description: Locally simulates Discord friends and requests. Persistent between reloads.

name: FixScreenshare
description: Fixes infinite loading and crashes on screenshare after reload (Ctrl+R) by forcing module re-initialization.

name: FixKrisp
description: Forces Krisp (Noise Suppression) to be available and auto-resets the audio pipeline so only background noise is suppressed (not the whole voice).

name: FloodPanel
description: Send a flood of messages rapidly in any channel. Load a custom .txt file or use the built-in phrases. Accessible from the chat bar.

name: FollowUser
description: Suit un user en vocal. Clic droit → Follow User. Coeur blanc = suivi actif (clic gauche = rejoindre, clic droit = unfollow). Auto-unfollow apres 30min d'inactivite.

name: FollowMe
description: Forces a user to follow you in voice channels (if you have permissions). Right-click a user -> Follow Me.

name: GhostClient
description: Discord ghost accounts — left-click to enable/disable, right-click to configure.

name: FriendLog
description: Logs friend requests and removals. Click entries to view profiles.

name: IconViewer
description: Adds a new tab to settings to preview all icons.

name: HideMedia
description: Hide attachments and embeds for individual messages via hover button

name: IgnoreCalls
description: Allows you to ignore calls from specific users or dm groups.

name: ImageZoom
description: Lets you zoom in to images and gifs. Use scroll wheel to zoom in and shift + scroll wheel to increase lens radius / size

name: InRole
description: Know who is in a role with the role context menu or /inrole command (read plugin info!)

commands.name: inrole
commands.description: Know who is in a role

name: LeaveAllServers
description: Leaves all selected servers. Accessible via right-click on a server.

name: LockGroup
description: Lock/unlock groups via the context menu (prevents adding members)

name: LiveWallpaper
description: Global wallpaper for the entire Discord interface (image, gif, video). Compatible with ChannelWallpaper.

name: LoginWithToken
description: Adds a 'Login with Token' button on the Discord login page.

name: MemberCount
description: Shows the number of online members, total members, and users in voice channels on the server — in the member list and tooltip.

name: MassDM
description: Sends a message to all your friends with an anti-rate-limit delay.

name: MessageLogger
description: Temporarily logs deleted and edited messages.

name: MessageCleaner
description: Cleans all messages in a channel with smart rate limiting and statistics

name: MessageLoggerEnhanced
description: Improves MessageLogger with edited message history, ghost ping detection and more

name: MigrateFromOtherClients
description: Backend para migrar settings de plugins, QuickCSS e temas de outros mods do Discord (Vencord, Equicord, Plexcord, Suncord, Shelter). UI fica em Backup & Restore.

name: MultiInstance
description: Opens a 2nd Discord (new window or split screen) with another account.

name: MuteAllServers
description: Right-click a server → mute all servers and mark all as read in one click.

name: OverlayFix
description: Tente de réparer l'overlay en trompant Discord sur le nom du processus (se fait passer pour discord.exe).

name: PinDMs
description: Allows you to pin private channels to the top of your DM list. To pin/unpin or re-order pins, right click DMs

name: PlatformSpoofer
description: Spoof what platform or device you're on

name: PlatformIndicators
description: Adds platform indicators (Desktop, Mobile, Web...) to users

name: raincordAI
description: AI Chat (Groq) integrated in Discord. Replaces 'Shop' in the DM panel.

name: RAINCORDUpdater
description: Verifica atualizações na inicialização. Detecta call ativa e reconecta automaticamente após o update.

name: ReadAllButton
description: Adds a button above the server list to mark all servers as read.

name: RealtimeTimestamps
description: Replaces Discord timestamps (e.g. 15:31) with live seconds (e.g. 15:34:21), updated every second.

name: ReverseImageSearch
description: Adds ImageSearch to image context menus

name: RoleColorEverywhere
description: Adds the top role color anywhere possible

name: SelfDestruct
description: Sends messages that are automatically deleted after a configurable delay. Red timer visible on each message.

name: ServerCloner
description: Clone an entire server (channels, roles, permissions, icon, emojis, embeds) to a server where you have ADMIN permission. Can be opened from server context menu.

name: SharePerms
description: Multi-user permission sharing with interactive UI.

name: ShowHiddenChannels
description: Show channels that you do not have access to view.

name: SilentDelete
description: "Silently" deletes a message. Bypass message loggers by replacing the message with a placeholder.

commands.name: silentpurge
commands.description: Silently delete your recent messages in this channel

name: StealthMode
description: Hides all plugin buttons without disabling them. Shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+H. The toggle is in RAINCORD Settings.

name: SoundCordPlayer
description: Integrated SoundCord player. Client ID is automatically fetched via native Electron process — no account required.

name: StreamProof
description: Hides messages, links, images, DMs, but not the screen share/voice grid. Toggle via chat bar button.

name: ThemeLibrary
description: A library of themes for Vencord.

name: TokenImporter
description: Import and verify Discord tokens.

name: Translate
description: Translate messages with Google Translate or DeepL

name: FakeNitro
description: Allows you to send fake emojis/stickers, use nitro themes, and stream in nitro quality

name: UserVoiceShow
description: Shows an indicator when a user is in a Voice Channel

name: ValidUser
description: Fix mentions for unknown users showing up as '@unknown-user' (hover over a mention to fix it)

name: VoiceChannelSearch
description: Search and join any voice channel across all your servers.

name: UserAreaTweaks
description: Creates an elegant floating dock for RAINCORD plugins using pure CSS, preventing overlap and crashes.

name: VoiceMessages
description: Allows you to send voice messages like on mobile. To do so, right click the upload button and click Send Voice Message

name: VoiceDownload
description: Adds a download to voice messages. (Opens a new browser tab)

name: ViewIcons
description: Makes avatars and banners in user profiles clickable, adds View Icon/Banner entries in the user, server and group channel context menu.

name: VoiceRejoin
description: Rejoins DM/Server call automatically when restarting Discord.

name: WhosWatching
description: Hover over the screenshare icon to view what users are watching your stream

name: WordBomb
description: Assistant BombParty/WordBomb avec overlay persistant, IA intégrée et alphabet track.
